decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: insert_index returns the LEFTMOST insertion point: the smallest index i such that every element before i is < target and every element from i on is >= target. For a target already present (possibly with duplicates) this is the index of its FIRST occurrence (bisect_left semantics, not bisect_right or an arbitrary matching index).
The change modifies only the module and adds no third-party dependency.

weighted.criterion: It returns the leftmost position (bisect_left), not the rightmost (bisect_right) and not the first arbitrary index a binary search happens to land on.
